Label: Collection
Description: A SKOS collection representing a group of co-evolving proteins (a protein orthology cluster) in EvoWeb; each instance (e.g., Node1, Node2, ...) groups together NCBI RefSeq proteins inferred to share evolutionary history

Label: member
Description: Relates a SKOS Collection to one of its member resources; in EvoWeb, links a protein group (Collection) to a constituent NCBI RefSeq protein (e.g., https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/protein/WP_xxx)

Label: label
Description: A human-readable label for a resource; in EvoWeb, the descriptive functional name of a protein group (e.g., 'chromosomal replication initiator protein DnaA')

Label: connected to
Description: Relates a protein group (SKOS Collection) to another protein group it is connected to; in EvoWeb, links one protein orthology cluster (Node) to another co-evolving cluster in the functional network

Label: secondary component
Description: Relates a protein group (SKOS Collection) to a secondary component identifier associated with it in EvoWeb (an opaque schema-namespaced id, e.g. 1_1_1135)
